Confidence Score: 3/5

- This PR is not ready to merge as-is — two logic bugs can cause incorrect agent activation signals and contradictory SSE feed events to clients. - Two logic bugs need fixing before merge: (1) `onAgentActivation` fires even when `createActivatedSession` fails, triggering phantom agent launches with no DB record; (2) the DELETE path in the feed bridge sends both an item and a removal for the same ID, causing conflicting client state updates. The rest of the implementation is architecturally sound and well-tested. The XML escaping and memory issues are lower priority but should be addressed to avoid subtle production issues. - `app/src/server/reactive/agent-activator.ts` (lines 562–584)
Continue from where you left off.
